case_title: ANN ZHAI VS. BANK OF THE WEST

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ZHAI, ANN AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHAI, ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$15.00) SERVED JAN-17-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST
